# App Doodler

App Doodler is a web app for creating localized iOS App Store screenshots.

## Core purpose
- Upload screenshot templates (shots)
- Place and style text labels on top of each shot
- Reuse label positions across multiple languages
- Preview per-language outputs
- Export generated images for one language or all enabled languages

## Main workflow
1. Upload shot images in the Screenshot Strip
2. Open Screenshot Editor for a shot
3. Add/move/resize/rotate labels and edit text
4. Switch preview language in the language panel
5. Download one shot or all generated shots

## Image behavior
- If uploaded image aspect ratio matches target shot ratio, image is auto-resized to target size
- If aspect ratio does not match, user selects crop anchor (left/center/right or top/center/bottom) before apply

## JSON text import
- Import is available from "Import JSON"
- Supported format is direct language-map only
- Root keys are language codes, values are objects of label keys and string values
- Example:
{
  "en-US": {
    "label_1": "Plan your day faster",
    "label_2": "Main copy"
  },
  "es-ES": {
    "label_1": "Planifica tu dia mas rapido",
    "label_2": "Texto principal"
  }
}
- Legacy envelope format with "translations" or "slots" is rejected

## Language and persistence
- Multiple App Store language codes are supported
- Enabled language list is user-selectable
- Studio state is persisted in browser IndexedDB

## Platform scope
- Designed for desktop and iPad usage
- Small screens show a warning state

## Tech stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- TypeScript
- shadcn/ui
- Prisma + SQLite
